runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 2nd over 425m at Bendigo beaten 0.8 lengths (24.42) behind Paw Vanna in a T3 RSTW on April 2. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 2nd over 425m at Bendigo beaten 0.8 lengths (24.42) behind Paw Vanna in a T3 RSTW on April 2. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

runners.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by 2.5 lengths at this track (22.72) beating Kaelix Lass in a Maiden on March 30. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage fourth but before that won by 2.5 lengths at this track (22.72) beating Kaelix Lass in a Maiden on March 30. Will not find this easy. Not keen.

runners.formComment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 390m. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 390m. Not far away last start. Right in the mix again.

runners.formComment: Good performance to win by half a length at this track over 390m (22.50) beating Azzurro Wren in T3 RSTW on April 8. In winning form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good performance to win by half a length at this track over 390m (22.50) beating Azzurro Wren in T3 RSTW on April 8. In winning form and can measure up again.

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.73) at Shepparton in a Mix 6/7, finishing seventh and beaten 8 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Tough field and looking to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off and raced wide on home turn.

runners.formComment: Last start finished fifth in a Bottom Up - Restricted Win on April 6 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Where's Huntly, beaten 5 lengths (22.91). Looking to others this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Raced wide in home straight.

runners.formComment: Latest effort finished 3rd over 300m at Healesville beaten 2.25 lengths (17.09) behind Cream in a T3 RSTW on April 10. More than capable and has to be included.
